StatDef.label: incoming acid damage factor
StatDef.description: A multiplier on incoming damage taken of various acid types.

StatDef.label: incoming cold damage factor
StatDef.description: A multiplier on incoming damage taken of various cold types.

StatDef.label: incoming electric damage factor
StatDef.description: A multiplier on incoming damage taken of various electric types.

StatDef.label: incoming explosive damage factor
StatDef.description: A multiplier on incoming damage taken of various kinetic explosions.

StatDef.label: incoming heat damage factor
StatDef.description: A multiplier on incoming damage taken of various heat-related types.

StatDef.label: incoming psychic damage factor
StatDef.description: A multiplier on incoming damage taken of various psychic types.

StatDef.label: incoming radiation damage factor
StatDef.description: A multiplier on incoming damage taken of various radiation-related types.

StatDef.label: incoming skip damage factor
StatDef.description: A multiplier on incoming damage taken of various teleportation-related types.

StatDef.label: incoming toxin damage factor
StatDef.description: A multiplier on incoming damage taken of various toxin types.\n\nThis does not directly affect one's resistance to toxic buildup, although some of the affected damage types inflict toxic buildup in proportion to the amount of damage inflicted.
